tasks.title: Add filter/ai and attributes/ai processors to config/otel/collector.yaml
tasks.description: Add two new processors after the existing batch processor: filter/ai (regexp include for gen_ai.*, llm.*, openllmetry.*, ai.*) with error_mode: ignore, and attributes/ai (insert ai.environment=development, ai.platform=fawkes-idp)
acceptance_criteria: filter/ai processor exists in processors section with error_mode: ignore and regexp metric_names include
attributes/ai processor exists in processors section with two insert actions
Existing memory_limiter and batch processors are unchanged

tasks.title: Add metrics/ai pipeline to service.pipelines in config/otel/collector.yaml
tasks.description: Add metrics/ai pipeline: receivers [otlp], processors [memory_limiter, filter/ai, attributes/ai, batch], exporters [prometheus]. Do NOT modify existing metrics, traces, or logs pipelines.
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline has processors: [memory_limiter, filter/ai, attributes/ai, batch]
Existing metrics, traces, logs pipelines are unchanged

tasks.title: Add unit test for metrics/ai pipeline in test_otel_config_validation.py
tasks.description: Add a TestOTelAIPipeline test class that verifies metrics/ai pipeline exists, has correct receivers/processors/exporters, filter/ai and attributes/ai processors are defined, and existing pipelines are not modified.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify existing pipelines are unchanged

tasks.title: Validate: yamllint and unit tests pass
tasks.description: Run yamllint on config/otel/collector.yaml and run the full unit test suite. All must pass.
acceptance_criteria: yamllint config/otel/collector.yaml passes with no errors
pytest tests/unit/ passes with all tests green
